summary: Bug fix verification complete for LogiRent mobile client. All 2 reported bugs are FIXED: 1) Vehicles now showing (11 véhicules disponibles instead of 0) - agency_id filter correctly removed from client home page. 2) Bottom tab bar visible on mobile with logout icon in top navbar.

issues: Route './agency-app/components/*.tsx' missing default export warnings - non-breaking, expo-router issue
shadow* style props deprecated warning - use boxShadow instead

critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix properly implemented - agency_id filter removed from fetchVehicles call in index.tsx
Bottom tab bar correctly enabled for mobile viewports (<768px) using isMobile check in _layout.tsx
Logout icon (log-out-outline with red color) properly added in TopNavBar right section
FR/EN language toggle correctly hidden on mobile (<1024px) using isMobile conditional rendering
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) Client home page shows 11 vehicles (all available, not filtered by agency_id). 2) Mobile viewport (390px) shows bottom tab bar with 4 tabs (Accueil, Véhicules, Locations, Profil). 3) Red logout icon visible in top navbar on mobile. 4) FR/EN toggle hidden on mobile but visible on desktop (1920px). 5) Category filters (SUV, Berline, Citadine, Utilitaire) work correctly. 6) Admin login still works and agency dashboard loads properly.

bug_1_vehicles_not_showing.description: Vehicles now showing (11 véhicules disponibles instead of '0 véhicules disponibles')
bug_1_vehicles_not_showing.fix_applied: Removed agency_id filter from fetchVehicles call in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/index.tsx
bug_1_vehicles_not_showing.verification: Confirmed via Playwright test - page shows '11 véhicules disponibles'

bug_2_no_logout_button_mobile.description: Logout button now visible on mobile via red icon in top navbar and bottom tab bar added
bug_2_no_logout_button_mobile.fix_applied: Added bottom tab bar on mobile (<768px) in _layout.tsx, added red log-out icon in TopNavBar
bug_2_no_logout_button_mobile.verification: Confirmed via Playwright test - bottom tab bar with 4 tabs visible, logout icon in top right

category_filters.details: All: 11, SUV: 2, Berline: 6, filters work without agency_id interference

profile_navigation.details: Clicking Profil tab navigates to /profile page correctly

logout_functionality.details: Clicking logout icon redirects to /login page

admin_login.details: Agency admin login works and dashboard loads with 15 vehicles, 52 reservations

desktop_view.details: FR/EN toggle visible, bottom tab bar hidden, logout icon visible
